title: Ad Astra: Extra Additions
description: Adds content you never knew you wanted in Ad Astra
body:
# **Ad Astra: Extra Additions**
**Ad Astra: Extra Additions** is an addon mod to the majorly popular [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra) mod by [Terrarium / AlexNijjar](https://modrinth.com/organization/terrarium), obviously because of this Ad Astra is a required dependency so ensure you have that installed already.

## Requirements
![Available for Forge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5ab99e9e374660b90fc09e145467961de3ca075.png)
![Requires Ad Astra](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmedia.discordapp.net%2Fattachments%2F1073717602880327761%2F1073720491279384616%2FAd_Astra_64h.png&n=-1)

## Description

Currently this mod is my first dip into mod development, so only features a full expansion to Ostrum ore in Ad Astra; adding Ostrum tools and armor - it also implements an end-game armor known as Deshtrum which is made using Ostrum, Desh and Netherite to forge Deshtrum Ingots which can then be melted down into Melded Deshtrum Plate for armor. It also adds several high definition paintings to the painting pool in the 32x32 format.

## Features
### 1. Ostrum Items/Armor
```
Ostrum Items/Armor can be crafted out of Ostrum Plate which can be made from Ostrum Ore >> Ostrum Ingot >> Ostrum Plates
```
### 2. Deshtrum Items/Armor
```
Deshtrum is a new metal that combines the two metals Ostrum and Desh. 
It's an end-game armor that requires venturing to multiple planets/dimensions to obtain the resources required to craft it.
```
### 3. New Paintings & Blocks
```
Adds serveral new paintings to the painting pool aswell as a few cosmetic blocks that can be crafted with Ad Astra items. 
None of the blocks spawn in worldgen and remain completely optional.
```


## Images

![Ad Astra Additions: Ostrum Itemset](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df0a603400995e65e7c853304b7ce61565f23946.png)

![Melded Deshtrum Endgame Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb9b63d4d4e2bc04aacb72e2d1a9ebac27bbfbc0.png)
